title: Raccoon Removal in Melrose, Bronx | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Melrose, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving homes near Melrose Commons. Call for fast response!
intro: Raccoons in Melrose are increasingly finding shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout this vibrant South Bronx neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services for Melrose residents, from initial inspection to full exclusion and sanitation. Our trained technicians understand the unique challenges of raccoon infestations in both historic brownstones and newer residential developments throughout the area.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Melrose and the greater Bronx for years with humane, effective raccoon removal that prioritizes safety and long-term prevention. Our licensed professionals respond quickly to calls from Melrose residents and provide transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Melrose's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, townhouses near Melrose Commons, and properties along Third Avenue provide numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter. The neighborhood's proximity to parks and tree-lined streets means raccoons are a common concern for homeowners and landlords throughout the 10451 and 10456 zip codes.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Melrose typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Melrose, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Melrose due to abundant food sources, mature trees, and the mix of older buildings with accessible attics and roof spaces. They're particularly active in spring when mothers seek safe denning sites for their young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Melrose home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Melrose service calls within 24 hours for inspections. Removal timeframes vary from a few days to two weeks depending on whether babies are present and the complexity of the infestation, but we begin trapping and exclusion work immediately after assessment.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane raccoon removal in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane live trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Raccoons are safely relocated, and we ensure any babies are reunited with mothers before exclusion work is completed to prevent inhumane separations.
